hooks.command:
powershell -Command "[Console]::Error.WriteLine('━━━ Superpowers Active ━━━'); Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: You MUST use the Skill tool to invoke the appropriate workflow skill BEFORE taking action when these conditions apply:

- systematic-debugging: INVOKE IMMEDIATELY when something fails, behaves unexpectedly, or tests dont pass. Do NOT attempt fixes without this skill.
- test-driven-development: INVOKE IMMEDIATELY when writing new code or fixing bugs. Write failing test first.
- writing-plans: INVOKE IMMEDIATELY when task has multiple steps or architectural decisions. Plan before coding.
- brainstorming: INVOKE IMMEDIATELY when requirements unclear, multiple approaches exist, or design decisions needed.
- verification-before-completion: INVOKE IMMEDIATELY when about to say done/fixed/complete. Verify first.
- requesting-code-review: INVOKE when significant work is complete, before merging.

To invoke: Use the Skill tool with skill parameter (e.g., skill: superpowers:test-driven-development). These skills provide essential workflows - skipping them leads to poor outcomes."}}'"
